user.title: gHAndalf — get started
user.description: Map the two essentials and you're running. Everything else (air quality, presence, nudge timing) is grouped under Configure afterwards.

data_description.pv_production_power: The sensor reporting how much your solar is generating, in watts.
data_description.household_consumption_power: The sensor reporting how much the house is using, in watts.

init.title: gHAndalf settings
init.description: Pick an area to configure. Changes apply on save.

data_description.grid_import_power: Optional. Lets gHAndalf tell real export from battery charging.
data_description.grid_export_power: Optional. Power flowing out to the grid.
data_description.battery_soc: Optional. Used so advice respects a full/empty battery.
data_description.surplus_threshold_w: Only suggest using solar once this much (W) is going to the grid. Default 1000.

air_quality.title: Air quality & comfort
air_quality.description: Map a humidity sensor for each room that has a dehumidifier. Add the dehumidifier's plug-power sensor too (same HA area) and gHAndalf can tell when it's already running.

data_description.dehumidifier_sensors: One per room that has a dehumidifier. The room name comes from each sensor's HA area.
data_description.dehumidifier_power_sensors: Optional. Paired to a room by shared HA area; lets gHAndalf skip the nudge when it's already on.
data_description.humidity_threshold_pct: At/above this %, suggest running the dehumidifier. Default 60.
data_description.humidity_off_threshold_pct: At/below this %, suggest turning it off (if its plug shows it running). Default 45. The gap to the run-it value avoids on/off flapping.
data_description.dehumidifier_running_watts: Plug draw above which the dehumidifier counts as running. Default 10.

data_description.persons: Optional. If set, gHAndalf only nudges when at least one of these people is home. Leave empty to always nudge.

advanced.title: Nudges & timing
advanced.description: How often gHAndalf looks, and how it avoids nagging.

data_description.scan_interval: How often (seconds) to re-read your sensors. Default 30.
data_description.quiet_hours_start: No proactive nudges from this time…
data_description.debounce_seconds: A condition must persist this long before nudging, to ignore brief spikes. Default 300.
data_description.cooldown_minutes: Minimum gap before repeating the same advice. Default 60.
data_description.max_nudges_per_day: Cap on total nudges per day across everything. Default 8.
